debug_info.goal:
rec :
  (P Q : Prop) →
    (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) →
      ((hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp)) →
        ((hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) → (h : Disjunction P Q) → motive h
comp_left :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hp : P),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.left P Q hp) = h_left hp
comp_right :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hq : Q),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.right P Q hq) = h_right hq
⊢ False

proof:
classical
  let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun _ => Bool
  let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => true
  let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => false
  have e1 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = true :=
    (comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right True.intro).trans rfl
  have e2 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = false := by
    have hEq : (left (P := P) (Q := Q) True.intro) = right (P := P) (Q := Q) True.intro := rfl
    calc
      rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left True.intro)
          = rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) := by simpa [hEq]
      _ = h_right True.intro := comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right True.intro
      _ = false := rfl
  have : (true : Bool) = false := by simpa [e1] using e2
  cases this

  have hr :
      rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) = false :=
    by simpa [h_right] using (comp_right True True motive h_left h_right True.intro)
  have hEq : (left True.intro : Disjunction True True) = right True.intro := by
    have : rec True True (fun h => (h = left True.intro)) (fun _ => rfl) (fun _ => rfl)
        (left True.intro) =
      rec True True (fun h => (h = left True.intro)) (fun _ => rfl) (fun _ => rfl)
        (right True.intro) := by

    simpa using this
  have : (true : Bool) = false := by
    simpa [hEq] using (hl.trans hr.symm)
  exact Bool.noConfusion this

  let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Bool

classical

  let h_left : (hp : True) → motive (left hp) := fun _ => 0

let P : Prop := True

  let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => True.intro
  let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => True.intro
  have hrec_left : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = h_left True.intro :=
    comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have hrec_right : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) = h_right True.intro :=

  have hne : t' ≠ t := by

    have : (left t' : Disjunction P Q) = left t := by simpa [t, t'] using congrArg (fun u => left u) hEq

  exact hne ht'

let motive : Disjunction True True → Type
    | left _  => Unit
    | right _ => Empty
  let h_left : ∀ ht : True, motive (left ht) := fun _ => ()
  let h_right : ∀ ht : True, motive (right ht) := fun _ => by cases ht
  have hne : (rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro)) ≠
      (rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro)) := by
    intro hEq
    have : motive (right True.intro) := by
      simpa [hEq] using (rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro))
    exact this.elim
  have hEq : (rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro)) =
      (rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro)) := by
    simpa using congrArg (rec True True motive h_left h_right) (rfl : left True.intro = right True.intro)
  exact hne hEq

  have hEq :
      (left (P := P) (Q := Q) True.intro : Disjunction P Q) =
      (right (P := P) (Q := Q) True.intro : Disjunction P Q) := by
    rfl
  have htrue :
      rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left (P := P) (Q := Q) True.intro) = true := by
    simpa [h_left] using comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have hfalse :
      rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right (P := P) (Q := Q) True.intro) = false := by
    simpa [h_right] using comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have :
      rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left (P := P) (Q := Q) True.intro) =
      rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right (P := P) (Q := Q) True.intro) := by
    simpa [hEq]
  have : (true : Bool) = false := by
    calc
      true
          = rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left (P := P) (Q := Q) True.intro) := by symm; exact htrue
      _ = rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right (P := P) (Q := Q) True.intro) := this
      _ = false := hfalse
  cases this

classical
  let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun _ => Nat
  let h_left : ∀ _ : P, motive (left (P := P) (Q := Q) (by trivial)) := fun _ => 0
  let h_right : ∀ _ : Q, motive (right (P := P) (Q := Q) (by trivial)) := fun _ => 1
  have h₁ : (0 : Nat) = 1 := by
    have e : (left (P := P) (Q := Q) (by trivial) : Disjunction P Q) =
        (right (P := P) (Q := Q) (by trivial) : Disjunction P Q) := by
      rfl
    have hl :
        rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left (P := P) (Q := Q) (by trivial)) =
          h_left (by trivial) :=
      comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right (by trivial)
    have hr :
        rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right (P := P) (Q := Q) (by trivial)) =
          h_right (by trivial) :=
      comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right (by trivial)
    calc
      0 = rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left (P := P) (Q := Q) (by trivial)) := by
            simpa [h_left] using hl.symm
      _ = rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right (P := P) (Q := Q) (by trivial)) := by
            simpa [e]
      _ = 1 := by
            simpa [h_right] using hr
  exact Nat.zero_ne_one h₁

let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Bool
  let h_left : ∀ _ : True, motive (left (P := True) (Q := True) trivial) := fun _ => true
  let h_right : ∀ _ : True, motive (right (P := True) (Q := True) trivial) := fun _ => false
  have e :
      (left (P := True) (Q := True) trivial : Disjunction True True) =
        right (P := True) (Q := True) trivial := by
    simpa using (rfl : (trivial : True) = trivial)
  have ht :
      rec True True motive h_left h_right (left (P := True) (Q := True) trivial) = true := by
    simpa [h_left] using comp_left True True motive h_left h_right trivial
  have hf :
      rec True True motive h_left h_right (right (P := True) (Q := True) trivial) = false := by
    simpa [h_right] using comp_right True True motive h_left h_right trivial
  have : (true : Bool) = false := by
    calc
      true =
          rec True True motive h_left h_right (left (P := True) (Q := True) trivial) := by
            symm; exact ht
      _ =
          rec True True motive h_left h_right (right (P := True) (Q := True) trivial) := by
            simpa [e]
      _ = false := hf
  cases this

classical
  let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun _ => Bool
  let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => true
  let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => false
  let hp : P := True.intro
  let hq : Q := True.intro
  have h₁ : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left hp) = true := by
    simpa [h_left] using comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right hp
  have h₂ : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right hq) = false := by
    simpa [h_right] using comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right hq
  have : (true : Bool) = false := by
    simpa [h₁] using h₂
  cases this

let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun _ => Nat
  let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => 0
  let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => 1
  have hEq :
      rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) =
        rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) := by
    have : (left True.intro : Disjunction P Q) = right True.intro := by
      simpa using (rfl : (True.intro : P) = True.intro)
    simpa [this]
  have h0 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = 0 := by
    simpa [h_left] using comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have h1 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) = 1 := by
    simpa [h_right] using comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have : (0 : Nat) = 1 := by
    calc
      0 = rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) := by simpa [h0]
      _ = rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) := hEq
      _ = 1 := h1
  exact Nat.zero_ne_one this
  done

classical
  let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Nat
  let h_left : (hp : True) → motive (left hp) := fun _ => 0
  let h_right : (hq : True) → motive (right hq) := fun _ => 1
  have h0 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = 0 := by
    simpa [h_left] using comp_left True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have h1 : rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = 1 := by
    have : left True.intro = right True.intro := rfl
    calc
      rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro)
          = rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) := by simpa [this]
      _ = 1 := by
          simpa [h_right] using comp_right True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have : (0 : Nat) = 1 := by simpa [h0] using h1
  exact Nat.zero_ne_one this

classical
  let P : Prop := True
  let Q : Prop := True
  let motive : Disjunction P Q → Type := fun _ => Nat
  let h_left : ∀ hp : P, motive (left hp) := fun _ => 0
  let h_right : ∀ hq : Q, motive (right hq) := fun _ => 1
  have hEq :
      (rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left True.intro)) =
        (rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right True.intro)) := by
    have : (left (P:=P) (Q:=Q) True.intro) = right True.intro := by
      have : True.intro = True.intro := rfl
      simpa [P, Q] using congrArg (fun hp => (left (P:=P) (Q:=Q) hp)) this
    simpa [this]
  have h0 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) = 0 := by
    simpa [h_left] using comp_left P Q motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have h1 : rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) = 1 := by
    simpa [h_right] using comp_right P Q motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have : (0 : Nat) = 1 := by
    calc
      (0 : Nat) = rec P Q motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) := by symm; exact h0
      _ = rec P Q motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) := hEq
      _ = (1 : Nat) := h1
  exact Nat.zero_ne_one this

let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Nat
  let h_left : ∀ hp : True, motive (left hp) := fun _ => 0
  let h_right : ∀ hq : True, motive (right hq) := fun _ => 1
  have h0 : (rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro)) = 0 := by
    simpa [h_left] using comp_left True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have h1 : (rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro)) = 1 := by
    simpa [h_right] using comp_right True True motive h_left h_right True.intro
  have hEq :
      (rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro)) =
        (rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro)) := by
    have : (left True.intro : Disjunction True True) = right True.intro := rfl
    simpa [this]
  have : (0 : Nat) = 1 := by
    calc
      (0 : Nat) = rec True True motive h_left h_right (left True.intro) := by
        simpa using h0.symm
      _ = rec True True motive h_left h_right (right True.intro) := hEq
      _ = 1 := by
        simpa using h1
  exact Nat.zero_ne_one this
